priceUpdate: Price check: SOL is up 9.1% in 24h and down 2.9% on 7d. Tape is still two-way, so execution quality matters more than conviction calls.
thisWeek: This week: focus is shifting toward payments and ai agents. If those narratives keep getting real volume follow-through, SOL can hold higher.
nextWeek: Next week: watch whether payments and ai agents stay bid after the first reaction. If participation broadens, that usually feeds cleaner trend structure.
whatsHot: What's hot: ai agents, yield, new products are getting the highest share of Solana headlines right now.
